asset.title: L1 Read
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates an AI agent reading financial variance data from a structured sheet without modifying any values, supported by step-by-step trace highlights.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI clearly displays the 'Read' goal and highlights the specific rows being accessed by the agent.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the step-by-step execution from listing artifacts to reading specific variances and completing the task.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with high-contrast row highlighting and a clear progress indicator at the bottom.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and financial analysis context, showing agent actions mapped to sheet rows.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Appears to be a direct capture of a trace replay, showing authentic step-by-step execution.

legibility.evidence: Text, labels, and agent action chips are highly legible with appropriate contrast.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant to financial analysts and engineers looking at automated audit or data retrieval workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the read-only nature of the operation without implying any write actions.

observedEvidence: Step-by-step trace execution bar at the bottom
Row-by-row visual highlighting corresponding to agent read actions
Financial metrics table (Revenue, COGS, Gross profit, Net income)

defects.observed: The 'say' steps do not display the actual output text or value reported by the agent in the status bar.
defects.fix: Update the status bar to display the output text during the 'say' phase of the trace.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch a NodeRoom AI agent execute a read-only audit of financial variance metrics, tracing each step from artifact discovery to final reporting.
